title: Stocks Hit Record High as Wall St. Looks Beyond War
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The S&P 500 reached a new record high, showing investor optimism about resolving conflicts and looking beyond the Iran war. This surge indicates confidence in e
excerpt: The S&P 500 reached a new record high, showing investor optimism about resolving conflicts and looking beyond the Iran war. This surge indicates confidence in economic stability despite ongoing geopolitical tensions.

content.introduction: The S&P 500 reached a new record high, showing investor optimism about resolving conflicts and looking beyond the Iran war. This surge indicates confidence in economic stability despite ongoing geopolitical tensions.
body: Stocks Hit Record High as Wall St. Looks Beyond War Investors appear to be treating an end to the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran as a foregone
The S&P 500 approached a fresh record high Wednesday, reflecting investors' optimism that a peace deal would be reached before the war in
The S&P 500 hit a fresh record high on Wednesday, reflecting investors' optimism that a peace deal would be reached before the war in Iran
